name: Bait!
summary:
Can you catch them all?!

Relax, Fish, and Collect in the World’s #1 VR Fishing Game!
Bait! invites you to cast your line, reel in the fun, and complete your Fishodex in this immersive, relaxing VR fishing experience, enjoyed by millions of players worldwide. Whether you’re a seasoned angler or new to fishing, explore vibrant lakes, catch a variety of fish, and collect them all to complete your ultimate fishing collection—all from the comfort of your home.

Key Features:
🎣 Fish Across 8 Scenic Lakes –...
